name: relay
description: Connect Claude Code to your institution's Relay cryo-EM workflow platform. Provides MCP tools for managing projects, spaces, and processing pipelines, plus a skill with domain knowledge about the workflow.

server_url.title: Relay server URL
server_url.description: The base URL of your institution's Relay server, e.g. https://relay.example.com (provided by your cluster admin)

api_token.title: Personal access token
api_token.description: Your Relay personal access token — generate one in Relay under your user settings
